response.justification: The candidate far exceeds the 6+ year experience bar with deep full-stack work in TypeScript/Node.js and React (Optilyz, RIDE), plus directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling at re:cinq. Strong engineering culture (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, code katas) aligns with the role's emphasis on quality, testing, and architecture. Gaps are mostly framework-specific (no explicit Nest.js or Vitest) rather than fundamental, and the breadth of polyglot experience suggests these are easily picked up. A solid interview candidate.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack with TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, AWS, and Kubernetes
Direct AI-agent and MCP code-generation experience at re:cinq
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, code reviews, and testing leadership
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience (primary stack frameworks)
Heavy emphasis on DLang, which is outside the target stack
PostgreSQL and Kotlin not demonstrated (only MongoDB/MySQL and Java)
